macro.title: Dow Set to Open Down as Inflation Fears Grip Markets - Barron's
macro.summary: Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq futures are falling in premarket trading as the stock market grapples with inflation fears amid the continuing Iran war.

macro.title: NextEra Energy to buy Dominion in a deal that combines two key players in the race to power AI data centers - CNBC
macro.summary: Dominion powers the world's largest data center market in Northern Virginia. NextEra is the biggest renewable energy developer in the U.S.

macro.title: Three ways the AI boom may fizzle — and what happens to stocks next - MarketWatch
macro.summary: A pullback in big tech capex may rattle markets

macro.title: New York commuters face rush-hour chaos in first major rail strike in 30 years - BBC
macro.summary: Workers on the LIRR, the busiest railway in the US, went on strike on Saturday after not reaching a new contract deal, halting all trains running into Manhattan and Queens from Long Island.

macro.title: China’s Economy Slows Sharply as Investment Resumes Declines - Bloomberg.com
macro.summary: China’s growth slowed across the board in April with investment resuming declines, calling into question the government’s reluctance to add stimulus to the economy as a global energy crisis hits factories and consumers across the world.
